programme.desc: When a young African-American man visits his white girlfriend’s family estate, he becomes ensnared in the more sinister, real reason for the invitation.

programme.desc: An unflinchingly honest story of a family in distress. Stars Nicole Kidman and Jack Black.

programme.title: Wifelike
programme.desc: Designed to behave like the late wife of a detective, an artificial human questions her reality as memories of a past life begin to resurface.

programme.title: The Titan Games S1
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

programme.title: Splitsville

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets

programme.title: Taeyong: TY Track in Cinemas
programme.desc: Taeyong is the first NCT member to make a solo debut. He released a mini album and held a 2-day concert. Witness his outstanding performance and take a closer look at him behind the stage.

programme.title: Innocent Witness
programme.desc: A housekeeper is charged with murder. Her attorney is surprised to learn the only witness to the crime is a teenage girl with Asperger's. Will the girl be able to provide a valid statement?

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A radio DJ receives a letter written 23 years ago. Through the letter, the story of his first love and friendships of five friends are revealed.

programme.title: Where Would You Like to Go?
programme.desc: A tragic accident claims the lives of a teacher. His widow seeks solace in a trip to Warsaw, where an unexpected reunion and a letter bring hope to her journey of healing and rediscovery.

programme.title: The Magician
programme.desc: A talented young magician falls for a princess betrothed to his former teacher, leading to a fierce showdown between the two powerful magicians.

programme.title: Prison Chaos
programme.desc: Prison is a hell where only the strong survive. Under Hwang's reign, the peace in prison can be maintained. The newcomer Han breaks the peace and reveals the hidden secrets there...

programme.title: Big Match
programme.desc: A man framed for murder battles a game planner who is intent on turning a city into one giant game board that he can control.

programme.title: Montage
programme.desc: 5 days before the statute of limitations of a 15-year-old kidnapping case expires, a flower is left anonymously at the original crime scene. A few days later, a similar kidnapping takes place.

programme.title: You Will Die in 6 Hours
programme.desc: Jun-woo tells Jung-yoon that she'll be stabbed to death in 6 hours. She doubts his words but still wants to find out the truth. She later realizes he is related to serial killings...

programme.title: The Snitch
programme.desc: Kang-soo was falsely accused and imprisoned. A prosecutor offered him a deal to be a snitch in exchange for a reduced sentence and Kang-soo starts to shake up the drug investigation...

programme.title: Hidden Face
programme.desc: While Sung-jin is searching for his fiancée Su-yeon, he meets her friend Mi-ju. A breathtaking thriller unfolds in which Su-yeon, who is trapped in a secret room, witnesses a naked truth.

programme.title: Beautiful Audrey
programme.desc: Mi-yeon and her son Ki-hoon run a noodle restaurant. Her daughter, Ji-eun left for her dream. One day, Mi-yeon is diagnosed with a disease. Will this family be able to protect each other?

programme.title: Single in Seoul
programme.desc: Yeong-Ho is a famous influencer who praises living a single life. Hyeon-Jin is an editor who is desperate about finding her partner. The two meets while working together for a book.

programme.title: Noryang: Deadly Sea
programme.desc: In the last battle of Yi Sun-Sin in 1598, he fought against the Japanese army and intertwined with the Ming dynasty, bringing the 7-year Japanese invasions of Korea to an end...

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Ian starts to sleepwalk around Harmony Harbor, TZG secretly guides him back to his own bed where he can continue sleeping safely. / When Felicia wants to run an obstacle course for the first time but is afraid she’ll embarrass herself, TZG secretly boosts her confidence by helping with practice.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Gloria becomes determined to earn her Queen of Kindness Kidizen badge and welcomes some free-spirited rats who need a place to stay into the habitat. Despite her discomfort, Gloria encourages the rats to make themselves at home. When the rats play with her special baby tusk at the bottom of her tank, she finally snaps and sends the rats home. It isn't until the gang winds up at the rats' nest and Gloria almost takes a slice of the rats special cheese that she learns it's okay to say no.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Alex realizes he’s too small to climb onto his new habitat “stage”, he feels too small for his dreams- until he hears of a big, new roller coaster at Coney Island and figures if he can ride the big coaster, that’ll prove that he’s a BIG deal! But when Alex is too short to be allowed on the ride- and his friends find themselves stuck at the top of it- Alex saves the day when he realizes that there are advantages to being small, and learns that his body is perfect just the way it is.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy and the Gabby Cats prepare for a sleepover in the Garden, they discover Pillow Cat has never been to a sleepover. They help her conquer her fears and enjoy her first sleepover.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes two little containers of popcorn and two movie tickets, it’s movie night in the dollhouse! Demanding Director CatRat leads the Gabby Cats through a Gabby-fied version of a classic story, Gabby-locks and the Three Bears.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When the Rescue Riders save Viking chief Duggard, they’re invited to visit his village of Huttsgalor, where they must prove they're kind and helpful.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Dak's lack of planning gets him, Cutter and Winger lost with Elbone in the Maze Caves, and Leyla's overthinking threatens the effort to rescue them.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Peabody and Sherman try to do the show in a new city but end up on the moon instead and must get home before astronauts take over the penthouse

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Sherman accidentally swaps a class project with a dinosaur egg that hatches on stage, so Peabody must help to send it back before it ruins the show

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders “borrow” the bathysphere to rescue a dragon from the depths of the Giant Realm Sea.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: While punished, Tom must sneak out to rescue the Riders from Buzzsaw.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: When Masikura convinces King Julien that the island is sinking, Julien believes building an ark is the only way to save his people

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: When the Jungle Rooster keeps him up at night, Julien discovers that the Foosa have been farming chickens for food and risks his life to free them all

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Jack Sprat and Puss journey underground in search of treasure and discovery a kingdom of moles led by a rather bizarre king.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: To prove he's a ladies' man, Puss rescues a mermaid, who instantly falls in love with him … and becomes his worst nightmare

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup doesn't know who to trust when Viggo and Ryker each tell him that the other has gone rogue, and is sidetracked when a new dragon attacks.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: An extremely powerful new dragon attacks Dragon's Edge, and Hiccup makes a dangerous alliance while the fate of the Dragon Eye hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: After Hiccup is shot down on a remote island while searching for Viggo and the Dragon Hunters, he questions Dagur's intentions to rescue him.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Tired of the farm's feud with the neighboring punch monkeys, Ugga arranges a punch summit where the Bettermans and Croods will stay in the punch monkey village to learn how to all get along.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Phil detects a meteor is hurtling towards the farm, the Bettermans and Croods must decide how to spend their last day on earth.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Struggling to find their purpose on the Betterman farm, the Croods see an opportunity to prove their worth by harvesting Phil’s perilous (and sticky) bounceberries.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Turtleneck is captured by Frederic Estes, Boss Baby and Tim attempt to rescue her, leading them to the terrifying "fun house" at the town fair

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Boss Baby is fired from Baby Corp;he attempts to navigate regular baby life in a Mommy/Daddy/Baby playgroup. Even worse;the playgroup’s other new member is Mega Fat;whose animatronic stuffie Wagby malfunctions and threatens the safety of the whole group. Meanwhile;Tim does everything he can to avoid doing his homework.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When the crowded bathroom situation at the local museum threatens baby love;Boss Baby leads his new team of playgroup babies on their first mission…and then their SECOND mission after a klepto baby in their group swipes a priceless artifact. In a continued attempt to avoid homework;Tim joins Boss Baby on his mission.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and Thunder discover a baby Nightlight and must bring him back to Thunder’s home realm.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: When Thunder’s clan of fellow Nightlights is attacked by the Snow Wraith, Tom vows to rescue them.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Moving to an exotic new home, an adventurous teenager meets a new group of kids and discovers a dragon in the fissure.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The Dragon Knights make a deal for the Storm Wheel but first must obtain the other Storm Wheel from a mysterious mad scientist. Though Mastodon continues to warn the team about the dangers in using the Tianshang Weapons, they use them in a fight against Klaus and Veruca. The clash of the weapons wakes a dormant volcano!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The Mad Scientist turns out to be an ally called Akna, who has a history with Blade's brother Alfie. And Blade learns another truth about her brother and his mission. And in the course of a skirmish with Klaus and Veruca, the weapons change hands again.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: As the Dragon Knights prepare to battle for the weapons and control of Tikal, Mastodon attempts to teach Po how to access storm powers to use in the fight. Blade comes face to face with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: In an awesome chase/battle through the desert, the crew goes up against Rafaela, Matsuo, and Sandocal – who are driving the kids’ own cars. The crew struggles to fight back while also not losing the trail to Cleve’s base in the desert. When Rafaela turns on Sandocal, he and Layla decide to work together and manage to overpower Rafaela and Matsuo. Sandocal tells the kids to go to escape toward the Bedouin Shield.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: It’s revealed that Cleve is building a massive weather machine that is generating dangerous desert storms, with the help of a genius North African teen named Ziri. When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up. But after the storm clears, Tony challenges the brothers to a camel race in order to get their help tracking down Cleve – and he wins! Now the Bedouins have to take the kids to the Eye of the Sahara, a huge strange storm that they know has something to do with Cleve’s plot. Elsewhere in the Sahara, Ms. Nowhere and Gary are captured by Cleve.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Jim is unavailable to do a simple Trollhunter task Toby and Claire take on the responsibility to prove they can carry their weight... literally.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Pixies attack Arcadia Oak High the students and faculty must fight their greatest fears Jim faces Angor Rot which takes an unlikely turn.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: NotEnrique throws a house party for the Trolls of Arcadia Jim and Tobys search for a way to remove Stricklers ring takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Stuart’s larger-than-life ex-girlfriend surprises him with a visit, Aja, Steve, Vex, and Nana join them on a triple date— where issues from each of their relationships come to a head. Meanwhile, Krel, Toby, and Eli discover a new passion: Sci-Fi filmmaking.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With an asteroid hurdling toward Earth, threatening to destroy Arcadia Oaks, Aja and Krel must join forces with Area 49-B -- Colonel Kubritz and Tronos -- to stop it. These strange bedfellows might save the town, but this alliance comes at a cost.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Krel finally gets the wormhole generator working, only for Luug to eat it! The Royals race to catch their teleporting pup before their secret alien identities are uncovered. But the chase for Luug uncovers something far worse… Morando is on Earth.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela’s mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela’s true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn’t doing all of this for the money - she’s doing it for family.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms. Nowhere’s mission – what could Cleve be up to in the desert?

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or “The Dead End,” in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom. The crew manages to steal a few of the dune buggies and take off into the desert! Meanwhile, Rafaela and Matsuo bust into a secret military base and steal an important piece of tech for Cleve.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: Dinotrux

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Curse of the Sarcophagus Ra throws out the instruction manual for his new high-tech Sarcophagus without reading it first. Whiz Kid Ra When Ra secretly uses the all-knowing Answertorium to ace a test, he earns a reputation for having all the answers.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Dimension Demented When Ra tries to bring a jukebox to school by stuffing it into the Dimension Tube, he ends up sending himself on a terrifying inter-dimensional journey. The Taming of The Gloutch Gloutch raising—a test all Scare School students must take—involves raising a cute, adorable creature into a terrifying monster.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert is very excited. Mother Nature has given him a special elixir to help his sunflower seeds grow but there's a big surprise to come.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: When Mum's cuckoo clock breaks time stops and Ping Pong, Ming, Edward and Bill freeze in time. Rupert and the Fox Twins have to find a way to get time ticking again

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Kelp and Scallop discover Mr. Pearly has a cave full of stuff they help him to realize it could help a lot of other sea creatures. / When the group goes camping, Kelp helps Ollie learn that even though it didn’t go exactly as planned, they can still have loads of fun.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop help Dad discover the true meaning of family trips. / When the Great Great Grandicorn comes to visit, the kids learn that making mistakes is part of learning.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Huzzah! Gabby the Bold and Pandy the Purr-owd are Knights in Training, and they head into the dollhouse for the Royal Knighting Ceremony. But it turns out that someone's locked King Catnip in the tower and without him they'll have to cancel the Royal Knighting Ceremony! It's up to the Knights in Training to solve the mystery and save King Catnip by performing acts of knighthood. For our Cat of the Day, Pandy makes a shield craft!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby receives a special nighttime delivery, unboxing a glow-in-the-dark train engine. However, she realizes that she's missing the other three train cars to complete the whole train. The Gabby Cats help Gabby build the other three glow-in-the-dark train cars by creating shapes through interactive/musical games. In our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, DJ Catnip sings a song.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Alex lands a role in a big Hollywood movie, but his part is threatened by a diva-like bull. Alex nearly gives up, but with the help of his friends, learns that no one can bully him out of what he loves to do.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Melman loses his first tooth, he fears he won't be Kate's baby anymore and goes on a city-wide chase to recover his tooth before Kate can replace him with a younger, cuter animal.

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.desc: When Ian starts to sleepwalk around Harmony Harbor, TZG secretly guides him back to his own bed where he can continue sleeping safely. / When Felicia wants to run an obstacle course for the first time but is afraid she’ll embarrass herself, TZG secretly boosts her confidence by helping with practice.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Gloria becomes determined to earn her Queen of Kindness Kidizen badge and welcomes some free-spirited rats who need a place to stay into the habitat. Despite her discomfort, Gloria encourages the rats to make themselves at home. When the rats play with her special baby tusk at the bottom of her tank, she finally snaps and sends the rats home. It isn't until the gang winds up at the rats' nest and Gloria almost takes a slice of the rats special cheese that she learns it's okay to say no.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Alex realizes he’s too small to climb onto his new habitat “stage”, he feels too small for his dreams- until he hears of a big, new roller coaster at Coney Island and figures if he can ride the big coaster, that’ll prove that he’s a BIG deal! But when Alex is too short to be allowed on the ride- and his friends find themselves stuck at the top of it- Alex saves the day when he realizes that there are advantages to being small, and learns that his body is perfect just the way it is.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy and the Gabby Cats prepare for a sleepover in the Garden, they discover Pillow Cat has never been to a sleepover. They help her conquer her fears and enjoy her first sleepover.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes two little containers of popcorn and two movie tickets, it’s movie night in the dollhouse! Demanding Director CatRat leads the Gabby Cats through a Gabby-fied version of a classic story, Gabby-locks and the Three Bears.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When the Rescue Riders save Viking chief Duggard, they’re invited to visit his village of Huttsgalor, where they must prove they're kind and helpful.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Dak's lack of planning gets him, Cutter and Winger lost with Elbone in the Maze Caves, and Leyla's overthinking threatens the effort to rescue them.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Peabody and Sherman try to do the show in a new city but end up on the moon instead and must get home before astronauts take over the penthouse

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Sherman accidentally swaps a class project with a dinosaur egg that hatches on stage, so Peabody must help to send it back before it ruins the show

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders “borrow” the bathysphere to rescue a dragon from the depths of the Giant Realm Sea.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: While punished, Tom must sneak out to rescue the Riders from Buzzsaw.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: When Masikura convinces King Julien that the island is sinking, Julien believes building an ark is the only way to save his people

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: When the Jungle Rooster keeps him up at night, Julien discovers that the Foosa have been farming chickens for food and risks his life to free them all

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Jack Sprat and Puss journey underground in search of treasure and discovery a kingdom of moles led by a rather bizarre king.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: To prove he's a ladies' man, Puss rescues a mermaid, who instantly falls in love with him … and becomes his worst nightmare

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup doesn't know who to trust when Viggo and Ryker each tell him that the other has gone rogue, and is sidetracked when a new dragon attacks.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: An extremely powerful new dragon attacks Dragon's Edge, and Hiccup makes a dangerous alliance while the fate of the Dragon Eye hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: After Hiccup is shot down on a remote island while searching for Viggo and the Dragon Hunters, he questions Dagur's intentions to rescue him.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Tired of the farm's feud with the neighboring punch monkeys, Ugga arranges a punch summit where the Bettermans and Croods will stay in the punch monkey village to learn how to all get along.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Phil detects a meteor is hurtling towards the farm, the Bettermans and Croods must decide how to spend their last day on earth.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Struggling to find their purpose on the Betterman farm, the Croods see an opportunity to prove their worth by harvesting Phil’s perilous (and sticky) bounceberries.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Turtleneck is captured by Frederic Estes, Boss Baby and Tim attempt to rescue her, leading them to the terrifying "fun house" at the town fair

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Boss Baby is fired from Baby Corp;he attempts to navigate regular baby life in a Mommy/Daddy/Baby playgroup. Even worse;the playgroup’s other new member is Mega Fat;whose animatronic stuffie Wagby malfunctions and threatens the safety of the whole group. Meanwhile;Tim does everything he can to avoid doing his homework.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When the crowded bathroom situation at the local museum threatens baby love;Boss Baby leads his new team of playgroup babies on their first mission…and then their SECOND mission after a klepto baby in their group swipes a priceless artifact. In a continued attempt to avoid homework;Tim joins Boss Baby on his mission.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and Thunder discover a baby Nightlight and must bring him back to Thunder’s home realm.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: When Thunder’s clan of fellow Nightlights is attacked by the Snow Wraith, Tom vows to rescue them.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Moving to an exotic new home, an adventurous teenager meets a new group of kids and discovers a dragon in the fissure.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The Dragon Knights make a deal for the Storm Wheel but first must obtain the other Storm Wheel from a mysterious mad scientist. Though Mastodon continues to warn the team about the dangers in using the Tianshang Weapons, they use them in a fight against Klaus and Veruca. The clash of the weapons wakes a dormant volcano!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The Mad Scientist turns out to be an ally called Akna, who has a history with Blade's brother Alfie. And Blade learns another truth about her brother and his mission. And in the course of a skirmish with Klaus and Veruca, the weapons change hands again.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: As the Dragon Knights prepare to battle for the weapons and control of Tikal, Mastodon attempts to teach Po how to access storm powers to use in the fight. Blade comes face to face with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: In an awesome chase/battle through the desert, the crew goes up against Rafaela, Matsuo, and Sandocal – who are driving the kids’ own cars. The crew struggles to fight back while also not losing the trail to Cleve’s base in the desert. When Rafaela turns on Sandocal, he and Layla decide to work together and manage to overpower Rafaela and Matsuo. Sandocal tells the kids to go to escape toward the Bedouin Shield.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: It’s revealed that Cleve is building a massive weather machine that is generating dangerous desert storms, with the help of a genius North African teen named Ziri. When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up. But after the storm clears, Tony challenges the brothers to a camel race in order to get their help tracking down Cleve – and he wins! Now the Bedouins have to take the kids to the Eye of the Sahara, a huge strange storm that they know has something to do with Cleve’s plot. Elsewhere in the Sahara, Ms. Nowhere and Gary are captured by Cleve.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Jim is unavailable to do a simple Trollhunter task Toby and Claire take on the responsibility to prove they can carry their weight... literally.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Pixies attack Arcadia Oak High the students and faculty must fight their greatest fears Jim faces Angor Rot which takes an unlikely turn.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: NotEnrique throws a house party for the Trolls of Arcadia Jim and Tobys search for a way to remove Stricklers ring takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Stuart’s larger-than-life ex-girlfriend surprises him with a visit, Aja, Steve, Vex, and Nana join them on a triple date— where issues from each of their relationships come to a head. Meanwhile, Krel, Toby, and Eli discover a new passion: Sci-Fi filmmaking.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With an asteroid hurdling toward Earth, threatening to destroy Arcadia Oaks, Aja and Krel must join forces with Area 49-B -- Colonel Kubritz and Tronos -- to stop it. These strange bedfellows might save the town, but this alliance comes at a cost.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Krel finally gets the wormhole generator working, only for Luug to eat it! The Royals race to catch their teleporting pup before their secret alien identities are uncovered. But the chase for Luug uncovers something far worse… Morando is on Earth.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela’s mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela’s true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn’t doing all of this for the money - she’s doing it for family.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms. Nowhere’s mission – what could Cleve be up to in the desert?

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or “The Dead End,” in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom. The crew manages to steal a few of the dune buggies and take off into the desert! Meanwhile, Rafaela and Matsuo bust into a secret military base and steal an important piece of tech for Cleve.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: In an awesome chase/battle through the desert, the crew goes up against Rafaela, Matsuo, and Sandocal – who are driving the kids’ own cars. The crew struggles to fight back while also not losing the trail to Cleve’s base in the desert. When Rafaela turns on Sandocal, he and Layla decide to work together and manage to overpower Rafaela and Matsuo. Sandocal tells the kids to go to escape toward the Bedouin Shield.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ton-Ton and the Trux must protect a cluster of fragile Ankylodump eggs from the Scraptors after an earthquake separates them from their herd

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Curse of the Sarcophagus Ra throws out the instruction manual for his new high-tech Sarcophagus without reading it first. Whiz Kid Ra When Ra secretly uses the all-knowing Answertorium to ace a test, he earns a reputation for having all the answers.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Dimension Demented When Ra tries to bring a jukebox to school by stuffing it into the Dimension Tube, he ends up sending himself on a terrifying inter-dimensional journey. The Taming of The Gloutch Gloutch raising—a test all Scare School students must take—involves raising a cute, adorable creature into a terrifying monster.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert is very excited. Mother Nature has given him a special elixir to help his sunflower seeds grow but there's a big surprise to come.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: When Mum's cuckoo clock breaks time stops and Ping Pong, Ming, Edward and Bill freeze in time. Rupert and the Fox Twins have to find a way to get time ticking again

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Kelp and Scallop discover Mr. Pearly has a cave full of stuff they help him to realize it could help a lot of other sea creatures. / When the group goes camping, Kelp helps Ollie learn that even though it didn’t go exactly as planned, they can still have loads of fun.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop help Dad discover the true meaning of family trips. / When the Great Great Grandicorn comes to visit, the kids learn that making mistakes is part of learning.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Huzzah! Gabby the Bold and Pandy the Purr-owd are Knights in Training, and they head into the dollhouse for the Royal Knighting Ceremony. But it turns out that someone's locked King Catnip in the tower and without him they'll have to cancel the Royal Knighting Ceremony! It's up to the Knights in Training to solve the mystery and save King Catnip by performing acts of knighthood. For our Cat of the Day, Pandy makes a shield craft!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby receives a special nighttime delivery, unboxing a glow-in-the-dark train engine. However, she realizes that she's missing the other three train cars to complete the whole train. The Gabby Cats help Gabby build the other three glow-in-the-dark train cars by creating shapes through interactive/musical games. In our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, DJ Catnip sings a song.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Alex lands a role in a big Hollywood movie, but his part is threatened by a diva-like bull. Alex nearly gives up, but with the help of his friends, learns that no one can bully him out of what he loves to do.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 2
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: The Man With the Iron Fists
programme.desc: RZA co-writes, directs, and stars in this genre-blending, hip-hop-infused kung fu film set in Hong Kong, featuring Russell Crowe, Lucy Liu, and produced by Quentin Tarantino.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family’s estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: In Doomsday, a deadly virus resurfaces decades after quarantine. As chaos erupts, a team enters the walled-off zone to find a cure. Action-packed and gritty, it's a battle for survival.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 1

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: Stars' Top Recipe at Fun-Staurant
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: National Heritage Pilgrimage De O
programme.desc: National Heritage Pilgrimage De O

programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will "get rid of all your worries and all your concerns."

programme.title: The Seasons
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will "get rid of all your worries and all your concerns."

programme.title: Sweet Stranger and Me
programme.desc: A 30-year-old woman suddenly has a new father who is three years younger than her. With time, she accepts him as a family; he always takes her side and loves her unconditionally. What would happen to them?

programme.title: Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Dear.M
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: Krazy Rich Korean
programme.desc: Just how crazy do you have to be to conquer the world? Step inside the lives of the pioneers behind the Korean Wave, and discover what it really takes to achieve world-class success.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agent Wen is assigned to work undercover for a Southeast Asian arms dealer to locate and destroy a cache of munitions. However, when he finally finds them, he is attacked by unknown gangsters and must team up with his partner to recover the weapons and prevent a disaster.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Agent of Death
programme.desc: After undergoing a secret government experiment, CIA operative Tara gains the ability to shapeshift into anyone through DNA transformation, making her the ultimate infiltrator. When her father is murdered and evidence points to her own agency, she is forced to go rogue. Now, she must stop stolen uranium from triggering a global nuclear catastrophe.

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Military veteran Wu and undercover cop Ming rescue hostages on an island near Bangkok. Just as the mission is completed and they prepare to leave, Wu discovers his daughter has also been captured. Determined to save her, he stays with Ming to fight the thugs and rescue her.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agent Wen is assigned to work undercover for a Southeast Asian arms dealer to locate and destroy a cache of munitions. However, when he finally finds them, he is attacked by unknown gangsters and must team up with his partner to recover the weapons and prevent a disaster.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
programme.desc: The movie is adapted from real events. Detective Lin sets up a special unit to arrest the motorbike robber and the crime syndicate behind the thefts in Foshan. In the process, his pregnant wife is hit by a motorbike robber, leading him to uncover their revenge plan...

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle…

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong’s Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
programme.desc: The movie is adapted from real events. Detective Lin sets up a special unit to arrest the motorbike robber and the crime syndicate behind the thefts in Foshan. In the process, his pregnant wife is hit by a motorbike robber, leading him to uncover their revenge plan...

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle…

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Five Willow Fish is a Taiwanese dish that makes great use of the nation’s affluent fishery. Chef Long interprets this dish with masterful skills, and Jason creates a dish inspired by Five Willow Fish.

programme.title: There's a New Killer in Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. The two become fast friends, but soon Holly, another of Alice's friends, suspects there is more to Ronnie than meets the eye.

programme.title: I Was Octomom: The Natalie Suleman Story
programme.desc: In January 2009, Natalie gave birth to eight babies--the first human to accomplish this miraculous feat. However, instead of being celebrated for a record-breaking event, she faced harsh scrutiny.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: These homes have been selected for how they reflect the tastes and personalities of their owners. We’ll introduce you to the "Colourful House" and a "Plantérior" home featuring the "Jenggala" style.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: With the power of spirit behind Theresa, her journey giving the ultimate gift of peace continues. A touching follow-up message from a podcast reading confirms Theresa's lasting impact on those in need.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy drive to San Antonio to check out a foreclosure that a friend scored at auction. The house is a time capsule from the 1970s, complete with dirty shag carpet and a faulty HVAC system.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: Award-winning chef Josh Niland arrives to push the contestants to their limits with a unique dish from his acclaimed restaurant, St. Peter.The contestants must recreate his dish as closely as possible.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what it would be like to go back in time for a dining experience from a bygone era? In this episode, host Michael Yo transports viewers to a 1920s-style New York City speakeasy.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: It's make your own take-out time! On the menu tonight is Thai chicken. Made with both sweet and hot peppers, topped with basil and mint, it's sure to become your new takeaway favourite.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael's friends Leida and Veina show how to make three types of Albanian pizza, a rustic dish made with phyllo dough filled with beef, chicken and potatoes.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Braised pork knuckle is an auspicious dish served in weddings, birthday dinners, and Lunar New Years. Chef Garrison Cheng, makes a twist on classic pork knuckle by using braising and frying techniques.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Five Willow Fish is a Taiwanese dish that makes great use of the nation’s affluent fishery. Chef Long interprets this dish with masterful skills, and Jason creates a dish inspired by Five Willow Fish.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Pigs in a blanket are the quintessential party finger food. The problem is, you can never eat just one! These full-sized hotdogs wrapped in soft challah are the perfect solution.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Family is Theresa's cornerstone, which is why connecting people to their loved ones is her life's mission. In a reading she's never shared before, Theresa delivers healing messages to her son's friend.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Murder 101
programme.desc: Gabbi's luck hits a snag after reuniting with Charles David, Dean of Criminology at Williams College. She's there as a guest lecturer, but when Charles is found dead next morning an investigation begins.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard and his team try to make the grade when they partner with Bre, a college professor and aspiring flipper, to revive a rundown farmhouse in his old neighbourhood.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Bill's swinging-arm growth prevents him from living his retirement dreams. Regina distracts from the many moles on her face with a vibrant sense of style.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: The home chefs face their first team challenge when they’re tasked with pairing up with another region and grilling a delicious meal for 101 firefighters and emergency personnel.

programme.title: I Was Octomom: The Natalie Suleman Story
programme.desc: In January 2009, Natalie gave birth to eight babies--the first human to accomplish this miraculous feat. However, instead of being celebrated for a record-breaking event, she faced harsh scrutiny.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Murder 101
programme.desc: Gabbi's luck hits a snag after reuniting with Charles David, Dean of Criminology at Williams College. She's there as a guest lecturer, but when Charles is found dead next morning an investigation begins.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: It's make your own take-out time! On the menu tonight is Thai chicken. Made with both sweet and hot peppers, topped with basil and mint, it's sure to become your new takeaway favourite.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael's friends Leida and Veina show how to make three types of Albanian pizza, a rustic dish made with phyllo dough filled with beef, chicken and potatoes.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Taiwanese cuisine boasts wide variations of chicken soup, and Chef A-lin has a special recipe. Learn more about how Chef A-lin creates the most complex flavor with the most elegant approach.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: Award-winning chef Josh Niland arrives to push the contestants to their limits with a unique dish from his acclaimed restaurant, St. Peter.The contestants must recreate his dish as closely as possible.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Sometimes the best meals are kept locked behind closed doors, but in this episode host Michael Yo has the keys to some of the most special and secret dining spaces around.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Stephanie has dreams of being a caterer, but is humiliated by her giant baseball-sized scalp bump. Deb is afraid that the growth on the side of her knee may eventually paralyse her.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Pantoh is a Taiwanese dining experience where guests enjoy exquisite dishes in open-air venues. Chef Ah-yong showcases an emblematic dish of pantoh cuisine: calamari, sea snail, and leek soup.

programme.desc: Michael befuddles a hardware store patron with a collapsible spray paint can, and cuts a costume shop employee down to size when he shrinks into a leprechaun outfit. Later, a museum employee makes the discovery of a lifetime when a preserved egg hatches a baby dinosaur.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S2 11
programme.desc: Tonight, Michael tries to pull a fast one on burger joint patrons with his inflatable hot dogs and his unusual technique for bagging buns. Then he creeps out a flea market vendor when he brings an acrylic encased arachnid back to life, and later his co-worker doesn't give a hoot about her job at the camping store when an owl takes over their display.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 4
programme.desc: After Amy ruins one of Sheldon's favorite movies, Raiders of the Lost Ark, he gets defensive, seeking revenge. Meanwhile, Leonard discovers a way to get Penny to do anything

programme.title: Friends S8 7
programme.desc: Ross is happy to learn that pregnant Rachel wants to find her own apartment.

programme.title: ER S2 16
programme.desc: Burn victims flood the ER; Lewis learns her fate regarding plans to adopt her niece; Ross considers meeting his estranged father.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: The world's most revered monster is reborn as visionary new director Gareth Edwards (Monsters) unleashes the epic action adventure GODZILLA. Starring an international ensemble cast led by Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Oscar nominee Ken Watanabe (The Last Samurai, Inception), Elizabeth Olsen, Oscar winner Juliette Binoche (The English Patient) and Oscar nominee Sally Hawkins (Blue Jasmine) with Oscar nominee David Strathairn (Good Night, and Good Luck.) and Breaking Bad's Bryan Cranston, GODZILLA is a powerful story of human courage and reconciliation in the face of titanic forces of nature -- when the awe-inspiring creature rises to restore balance as humanity stands defenseless. This spectacular adventure pits the world's most famous monster against malevolent creatures that, bolstered by humanity's scientific arrogance, threaten our very existence.

programme.title: East of Eden
programme.desc: Hollywood legend James Dean stars in this adaptation of John Steinbeck's classic novel East of Eden. Teenaged Cal Trask (Dean--Rebel Without a Cause, Giant) longs for the affection that his father reserves for his brother Aron, but his efforts meet only rejection. Also attracted to Aron's girlfriend, Cal becomes so frustrated in his search for love and acceptance that he reveals a long-held secret about their mother to Aron . . . knowledge that now tears the family apart.

programme.title: ER S2 16
programme.desc: Burn victims flood the ER; Lewis learns her fate regarding plans to adopt her niece; Ross considers meeting his estranged father.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S2 11
programme.desc: Tonight, Michael tries to pull a fast one on burger joint patrons with his inflatable hot dogs and his unusual technique for bagging buns. Then he creeps out a flea market vendor when he brings an acrylic encased arachnid back to life, and later his co-worker doesn't give a hoot about her job at the camping store when an owl takes over their display.

programme.title: Smallville S1 2
programme.desc: Clark learns a fellow student has been attacked by Kryptonite-affected bugs and has taken on the life cycle of an insect -- with Lana as his prey.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 10
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori take a risk on a large covered item during an unusual auction. Will the reveal rev their profits or stall their cash flow? It's all determined in the biggest twist yet when their archrival wins a locker that puts the high-rolling couple in the palm of his hand.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 11
programme.desc: Buyers get stung when a locker unleashes a swarm of more than just merchandise. Then, when our buyers back away from a bin piled sky high with rusty office cabinets one hawk-eyed competitor sees something no one else does. And later, Jesse throws down to win antiques, but when the dust settles our winning bidder will discover a treasure trove of concealed cash.

programme.title: ER S1 22
programme.desc: Benton dazzles the staff; Lewis suspects a doctor/patient is not what he seems; Ross agrees to coach Jake's Little League team.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S15 4
programme.desc: Feel the adrenaline rush with 20 of the dumbest daredevils ever caught on film. We've got base jumpers, bull riders, tightrope walkers, even an alligator wrangler. And they all have one thing in common - hilarious fails. With hair-raising commentaryfrom our celebrity cast, including Leif Garrett, Todd Bridges and Chelsea Peretti.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 19
programme.desc: Jazz fixes Will up with his beautiful sister, Janet (guest star Vivica A. Fox - "Independence Day"), who turns out to be extremely bossy.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S2 12
programme.desc: Michael hits the jackpot at a convenience store and amazes a mother when he demonstrates her child's genius abilities at a toy store. Later, MIchael astonishes his Japanese restaurant co-worker with a set-up that really takes the cake.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S2 13
programme.desc: Michael leaves a co-worker out to dry at the garden center with a technologically confounding hose that wirelessly transmits water. Later, at the dog groomers, Michael's puppy takes to the catwalk after dressing himself in the most fashionable canine attire.

programme.title: Superman & Lois S4 7
programme.desc: After some concerning interactions in town, Clark is determined to protect his secret identity - a task complicated by Jonathan and Jordan.

programme.title: Smallville S1 3
programme.desc: Clark and Lex defy their respective fathers.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 12
programme.desc: The buyers come face-to-face with one of the strangest lockers ever seen. It's an odd opportunity that sends the bidding through the roof, but when the door is unlocked, Pandora's box reveals a surprise that sends its winning bidder through the roof.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 13
programme.desc: Cash is falling from the sky as our buyers go head to head at the biggest airport auction ever seen. Jesse gambles hard on a mystery box with a telling message. Then, Scott and Chrissy battle it out over a jet-fueled jewel. And later, the crowd is driven to a frenzy when Sean reveals a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity that's gonna make one deep-pocketed bidder's dreams come true.

programme.title: They Wait in the Dark
programme.desc: Amy and her adopted son Adrian flee from her abusive ex-girlfriend Judith. Seeking refuge in an abandoned farmhouse in Amy's Kansas hometown, they confront a supernatural evil force from her dark past that haunts Adrian. As Judith pursues them, Amy and Adrian must face the dangers both outside and within the house.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: A young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend who is a ghost with a disfigured face. The journey of revenge and ultimate terror has just begun!

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horrors haunt each family from within, and nothing is really as it seems.

programme.title: An Unquiet Grave
programme.desc: A year after Jamie's wife tragically died in a car accident, he persuades her sister, Ava, to accompany him to the accident site to perform a peculiar ritual. As the night progresses, it becomes evident that Jamie harbours sinister motives.

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: They Wait in the Dark
programme.desc: Amy and her adopted son Adrian flee from her abusive ex-girlfriend Judith. Seeking refuge in an abandoned farmhouse in Amy's Kansas hometown, they confront a supernatural evil force from her dark past that haunts Adrian. As Judith pursues them, Amy and Adrian must face the dangers both outside and within the house.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: A young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend who is a ghost with a disfigured face. The journey of revenge and ultimate terror has just begun!

programme.title: The Ones You Didn't Burn
programme.desc: After their father's death, Nathan and his sister return to their family home to prepare it for sale. While there, Nathan discovers that the land was stolen from the ancestors of two women accused of witchcraft. As he delves deeper, he uncovers an occult conspiracy linked to their father's death which now threatens them both.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...

programme.title: Waning Moon
programme.desc: Nuanchan is a famous and highly respected spiritual medium in a rural village in Thailand. She wants to train her niece, Ploy, to succeed her and Ploy needs to remain a virgin. When Ploy falls in love with her childhood friend Tul, their lives are in danger as the secret of the spiritual world is being unveiled.

programme.title: Never Leave
programme.desc: Strange incidents keep happening in Lin Yue's house after a car accident: her sister cannot see the images of her family members in the mirror; her father is peeping at night; and there is the sound of marbles from the attic every day at dawn. Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: The Ones You Didn't Burn
programme.desc: After their father's death, Nathan and his sister return to their family home to prepare it for sale. While there, Nathan discovers that the land was stolen from the ancestors of two women accused of witchcraft. As he delves deeper, he uncovers an occult conspiracy linked to their father's death which now threatens them both.

Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: Booked: First Day in (S1)
programme.desc: Every day, tens of thousands of people get booked into jails all across the country for crimes both big and small. 'Booked: First Day In' is their side of the story.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A suspect makes a chilling confession about a string of gruesome crimes; a deadly mistake made by a politician comes to light in the interrogation room; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A murderer refuses to cooperate no matter how many questions he faces; a no-nonsense detective wants answers and gets them; an interrogation room can't hold a suspect looking to escape; and more.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14)
programme.desc: Marjorie has collected items from thrift stores and estate sales over the years for various projects, which has led to a massive amount of clutter in her home, making living in the space very difficult.

programme.title: Taking the Stand (S3)
programme.desc: In 2006, Ken Juedes was found dead by his wife, Cindy Shulz-Juedes. For 13 years the case went cold until investigators linked her to the murder.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: The community of Macon, GA, is gripped in a wave of terror when a beautiful law student disappears from her apartment complex. Nobody knows where she could be or what could have happened.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: When a mother of three is found lying unconscious beneath her open, second-story window, Medical Examiner Dr. Dragovic suspects there is more than meets the eye.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: When the supposed great-niece of Marilyn Monroe, Krystal Jean Baker, 13, is found dead beneath a bridge in Texas' Bayou Country, investigators are stumped.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S5)
programme.desc: When a mother learns her daughter has been abused by the teenager's estranged father, the police are called. But, before the investigation can gather speed, the father visits unexpectedly.

programme.title: The Double Kidnap of Teddy Wang
programme.desc: The two kidnaps of Hong Kong tycoon Teddy Wang resulted in the world's largest ransoms, and a court battle over his estate between his father and his wife.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: A series of random nighttime shootings has the city of Phoenix on edge as police try to end the reign of terror and interrogate two suspects.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After a successful businessman is brutally strangled, investigators become suspicious of his widow and her secret friend.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a gas station robbery has a strange culprit; a driver arrested for DUI finds new ways to add to his rap sheet. And more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A woman alerts police to a crime she's committing; a golf game leads one player to see red on the green; a man wants to get paid by police during a traffic stop; and more!

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: JaRay Wilson texted her mother just minutes before she vanished. For over a year, the teen's friends, family, and community searched for answers.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: the Series
programme.desc: Heartbreaking accounts of families torn apart by crime. Ashley Wallace, who was almost killed by her own mother, Jenny Carrieri, whose search for her sister's murderer consumed her life.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: the Series
programme.desc: Tales of toxic love triangles—wives who stray from their husbands with disastrous results, a deadly case of online catfishing, and a lonely young woman who has an affair with a killer.

programme.title: Witness to Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: Police quickly identify a suspect in the murder of a local college professor, but a bombshell piece of technology stolen from the crime scene then points them in a completely different direction.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Ding Dong : Les Speciaux
programme.desc: Viola and Jan travel across Majorca to meet artists and locals. In Campos, they visit a restored historic house, then a ''finca'' renovated by a Swiss couple.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres Normandes
programme.desc: In Saint-Victor-l'Abbaye, David Gallienne meets Guillaume, a vegetable grower and fish farmer. Together, they cook a dish where trout and vegetables combine to create a tasty appetizer.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
